sections.paragraph:
Original: גּלבּע

Transliteration: gilbôa‛

Phonetic: ghil-bo'-ah

BDB Definition:

Gilboa = "swollen heap"
  1. a mountain-ridge at the southeastern end of the plain of Jezreel, site of the death of Saul and Jonathan

Origin: from H1530 and H1158

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
